title: pelargonium × laetum
intro: Pelargonium × laetum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × laetum, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
